Women Talking (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,456,531Details
International Box Office $3,719,329
Worldwide Box Office $9,175,860
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $541,879
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $58,833
Total $600,712
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Do nothing. Stay and fight. Or leave. In 2010, the women of an isolated religious community grapple with reconciling a brutal reality with their faith.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$40,530 (0.7% of total gross)
Legs:5.62 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:59.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:8 opening theaters/707 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,971,018

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 23rd, 2022 (Limited) by United Artists
January 27th, 2023 (Expands Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: February 9th, 2023 (Wide), released as Die Aussprache (Germany)
February 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Austria)
February 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Iceland)
February 10th, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
February 15th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
Video Release: March 7th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic content including sexual assault, bloody images, and some strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2731 (cert #53790), 5/11/2022)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Award nomination: 2023 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Writers Guild of America Best Adapted Screenplay Winner
Plot point: Mennonites, Orthodox Religion, Religious, Sex Crimes, Sexism
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Crime Drama
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Plan B Entertainment, Orion Pictures, Hear/Say Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
